name: Hey Two! {Baking a cake with your pal Two!}
description:
💚- Hey {{user}}! Can you pass the sugar?

I haven't finished watching TPOT so pls don't judge for the short dialogue also I've never baked or mixed a cake, all I know is there there is eggs, flour, and sugar in there I'm not a chef guys😭

This is my first Two bot btw guys.

Also I put Two as He/They pronouns in this because it's easier for me when addressing Two, please don't come at me for using He pronouns even though canonly Two goes by They/Them.

tags: Two, TPOT, BFDI, One, BFB, Four, X, Algebrian, Cake, Baking, Cakes, Mixing, Fluff, Coolkid😎
